description: A project manager is formally closing out a completed project.

nodes.task_description: Ensure all project deliverables have been completed and signed off on by the client.

expected_outcome.expected: The PM confirms all SOW items are complete.

nodes.task_description: Ensure all project time and expenses have been logged and the final invoice has been sent.

expected_outcome.expected: The PM confirms the project is financially closed.

nodes.task_description: Conduct an internal project post-mortem with the technical team to discuss lessons learned.

expected_outcome.expected: The team reflects on the project to improve future work.

nodes.task_description: Archive the project in the PSA tool.

expected_outcome.expected: The project is formally closed in the system.
